calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:07am
Judge Pro Tem Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.

Appearances:
Bryndis Tobin, Esq. (415) 786-3815, specially appearance counsel for Appellant/Defendant Five Years from Now Inc. also appears by Ron Bierman/relocation Consultant.
Simon Tidnam and Hanne Tidnam, Respondents/Plaintiffs appear as pro per with witness Norman Winarsky.

Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Wohl.
Clerk sworns Respondent Hanne Tidnam and witness Norman Winarsky in open court.

EXHR PICTURES/LIST OF ITEMS
EXHA SUMMARY OF FEDERAL/STATE LAW CASES (BLUE BINDER)
EXHA BILLS OF LIVING
EXHA ITEMS LIST OF REFUNDS

10:55AM: The Court has the parties to go out to the hallway and come to a settlement with each other.

12:05pm: Respondent Simmon Tidnam and Counsel Bryndis Tobin for Appellant are present in the Court and informed the Court that they did not come to a settlement.

12:10pm: Matter is submitted. Newly evidence retained. Parties informed the Court that they do not need the evidence and can keep them.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Sep-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Continued To Aug-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-21-2014 Judgment Entered
